feed.title: Kuiyonggen
feed.subtitle: Let kids grow up in love!

entry.title: Welcome To Kuiyonggen
entry.content:
• :snake: Hi, I’m @kuiyonggen.
  • :fish: I’m interested in reading and writing.
  • :monkey: I’m currently learning dev skills of apps.
  • :pig: I’m looking to exchange thoughts on life and work.
  • :man: I’m a father of two kids.

Writing

Bookmarks

github

edit

markdown

  • markdown-emojis - All the emojis

Book List

kids

tales

  • Gossie & Gertie - Olivier Dunrea

My kids love it. They learned from it that “they are best friends”. This was start in their English reading. I see it in their eyes. They want more tales like that. If you know something like the book, please let me know. I’ll be very thankful.

  • Little Hoot - Amy Krouse Rosenthal; Jen Corace - 2008
entry.summary: :snake: Hi, I’m @kuiyonggen. :fish: I’m interested in reading and writing. :monkey: I’m currently learning dev skills of apps. :pig: I’m looking to exchange thoughts on life and work. :man: I’m a father of two kids.
